name: Oriental Green Salad (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all salad vegetables in a large bowl and toss to mix.
2. In a blender or small jar, combine dressing ingredients and process briefly or shake well until combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to coat evenly.
4. Serve immediately.
- Serving size: 4
- Calories per serving: 42
- Protein per serving: 3 gm
- Fat per serving: 1/8 gm
- Carbohydrates per serving: 7 gm
- Sodium per serving: 464 mg
- Fiber per serving: 3 gm
